description: Reusable ChefFlow audience lenses for question optimization, market research routing, and research brief generation. These are analytical lenses, not real people contacted by Codex.

lenses.label: Chef
lenses.claim_limit: Can support workflow hypotheses unless backed by real chef evidence.

lenses.label: Client
lenses.claim_limit: Can support buyer journey hypotheses unless backed by real client evidence.

lenses.label: Guest
lenses.claim_limit: Can support attendee experience hypotheses unless backed by real guest evidence.

lenses.label: Vendor
lenses.claim_limit: Can expose supply workflow gaps, not validated vendor demand.

lenses.label: Staff
lenses.claim_limit: Can support operational fit hypotheses unless backed by staff evidence.

lenses.label: Partner
lenses.claim_limit: Can support partnership workflow hypotheses unless backed by partner evidence.

lenses.label: Public Buyer
lenses.claim_limit: Usually needs public market research or analytics before strong claims.

lenses.label: Developer Operator
lenses.claim_limit: Valid for technical feasibility and operational risk, not customer demand.
